title: TEMPLATE 83pcs Miniature book covers on A4 sheet | PDF
description: Please note that these are not books, but only book covers: they have no pages. The book is designed for paper weight 80 gsm. Examples were printed on self-adhesive photo paper with a density of 80 g/m2 in the mode for printing photographs with the highest quality on an inkjet printer. Please note that the templates are made in 1:12 scale and do not have other sizes. When printed, the text is practically unreadable. The color on your template may vary. You can use ready-made…
